summary: Frontend testing of WelcomeScreen feature complete. All 16 tests passed (100%). WelcomeScreen displays when navigating to /chat without conversationId - shows personalized greeting ('Hey {firstName}!'), 'Start a Free Conversation' CTA button (indigo with mic icon), animated sound wave (20 bars), colorful scenario pills (8 scenarios with green/blue/violet/amber/pink/teal backgrounds), floating mesh gradient blobs, and floating script characters. Clicking CTA or scenario pills creates conversation and navigates to chat view. Mobile sidebar toggle works correctly after z-index fix.
passed_tests: Personalized greeting shows user's first name ('Hey Test!')
'Start a Free Conversation' button visible with mic icon and indigo background
8 scenario pills with colorful backgrounds (green/blue/violet/amber/pink/teal cycle)
Sound wave animation with 20 indigo bars
10 floating script characters (あ, ñ, ü, 한, ç, 你, θ, ê, ш, ø)
Click 'Start a Free Conversation' creates conversation and navigates to /chat/{id}
Chat view displays after creating conversation (ChatHeader + MessageList + ChatInput visible)
Welcome screen NOT visible when conversation active
Scenario pill click creates scenario-based conversation with context
Navigate back to /chat shows Welcome screen again
Mobile sidebar toggle button visible on small screens
Sidebar New Chat dropdown works from within conversation
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed z-index issue on mobile sidebar toggle button (changed from z-10 to z-20 to prevent content div from intercepting clicks)
Scenario pill colors match requirements: green (#d1fae5), blue (#bfdbfe), violet (#e9d5ff), amber (#fed7aa), pink (#fecdd3), teal (#ccfbf1)
Framer Motion animations working correctly for mesh blobs, floating chars, sound wave bars, and scenario pill entrance
context_for_next_testing_agent: WelcomeScreen feature fully tested and working. Routes: /auth (login), /chat (welcome screen), /chat/{id} (chat view). Scenarios tested: job_interview, restaurant, shopping. Mobile sidebar z-index fixed. Console shows 404 errors for /curriculum endpoint when creating new conversations - these are expected (handled gracefully in code). Voice recording NOT tested (requires mic).

welcome_screen_elements.floating_script_chars: あ, ñ, ü, 한, ç, 你, θ, ê, ш, ø
